title: lora_l2.c:734 stop uses lora_transition not lora_transition_from
description: Contract violation: lichen_lora_l2_stop() - Uses lora_transition(LORA_STOPPED) at line 734 instead of lora_transition_from(LORA_RUNNING, LORA_STOPPED). Same issue as start(): state could theoretically change between double-check and transition. WHY: Defensive programming suggests CAS-style transition. HOW to fix: Use lora_transition_from(LORA_RUNNING, LORA_STOPPED).
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-d7ub.18 - same root cause (non-CAS state transitions)
